questionHtml:
Three energy sources for power stations are

       I.     fossil fuel

       II.     pumped water storage

       III.     nuclear fuel.

Which energy sources are primary sources?

A.     I and II only

B.     I and III only

C.     II and III only

D.     I, II and III

meta.title: Three energy sources for power stations are I. fossil fuel II. pumped water storage III. nuclear fuel. Which energy sources are primary sources? A. I and II only B. I and III only
